title: pyrus lanuginosa
intro: Pyrus lanuginosa, also known as the downy pear or woolly pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Pyrus lanuginosa typically include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the bark, leaves, or fruits of the plant, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
